side_effects.description: Significant protein intake required to preserve muscle; physically painful to consume enough protein at higher doses

protocol_notes: Shares personal experience noting need for 3-4 protein shakes plus high-protein meals daily when on Reta to avoid muscle loss. Mentions stacking with Tesa for muscle preservation. References dose range of 3-8mg/week at higher levels. Notes slow fat loss of 1-2% body fat over 8 weeks during titration when preserving muscle.
